sandhaye saralā sūcī vakrā chedāya kartarī
sapatnasahite kārye kṛtvā sandhiṃ na viśvaset
sapatnīnāṃ śate vāsaḥ putrasyāpi na darśanam
sa bandhuryo hiteṣu syātsa pitā yastu poṣakaḥ
sa bhāraḥ saumya bhartavyo yo naraṃ nāvasādayet
sabhā vā na praveṣṭavyā vaktavyaṃ vā samañjasam
samstho viṣamastho vā pāpo vā yadi śuciḥ
samāne śobhate prītī rājñi sevā ca śobhate
samāyāte kānte kathamapi ca kālena bahunā
samārambhā bhagnāḥ kati na vārāṃstava paśo
samairvivāhaṃ kurute na hīnaiḥ samaiḥ sakhyaṃ vyavahāraṃ kat
saṃpattau ca vipattau ca bhavane vā vane 'pi vā
saṃpaṇṇaṃ goṣu saṃbhāvyaṃ saṃbhāvyam brāhmaṇe tapaḥ
saṃpūrṇakumbho na karoti śabdamardho ghaṭo ghoṣamupaiti samy
saruṣi nṛpe stutivacanaṃ tadabhimate prema taddviṣi dveṣaḥ
sarpaḥ krūraḥ khalaḥ krūraḥ sarpātkrūrataraḥ khalaḥ
sarpayukte gṛhe vāso mṛtyureva na saṃśayaḥ
sarpāḥ pibanti pavanaṃ na ca durbalāste
sarpāṇāṃ ca viṣaṃ dante makṣikāṇaṃ ca mastake
sarvaṃ kṛtaṃ vināśāntaṃ jātasya maraṇaṃ dhruvam
sarvatra ramate prājñaḥ sarvatra ca virājate
sarvathā svahitamācaraṇīyaṃ kiṃ kariṣyati jano bahujalpaḥ
sarvasya gātrasya śiraḥ pradhānaṃ sarvendriyāṇāṃ nayanaṃ pra
sarvasya dayitāḥ prāṇāḥ sarvasya dayitāḥ sutāḥ
sarvasya hi parikṣyante svabhāvā netare guṇāḥ
sarvasvarṇamayī laṅkā na me rocati lakṣmaṇa
sarvaḥ sarvaṃ na jānāti sarvajño nāsti kaśca na
sarvāṇi bhūtāni sukhe ratāni sarvāṇi duḥkhasya samudvijante
sarvāsāmapi nārīṇāṃ madhye śrīḥ subhagā khalu
sarvo daṇḍajito loko durlabho hi śucirnaraḥ
savitā vidhavati vidhurapi savitarati tathā dinanti yāminyaḥ
sa sahṛdvyasane yaḥ syātsa putro yastu bhaktimān
saha dīrdhā mama śvāsairimāḥ saṃprati rātrayaḥ
sahasā vidadhīta na kriyāmavivekaḥ paramāpadāṃ padam
sahasva śriyamanyeṣāṃ yadyapi tvayi nāsti sā
sahayena vinā naiva kāryaṃ kimapi sidhyati
sa hyamātyaḥ sadā śreyānyaḥ kākinyāpi vardhayet
sā kavitā sā vanitā yasyāḥ śravaṇena darśanenopi
sā jihvā yā jinaṃ stauti taccitaṃ yajjine ratam
sādhu mātula gītena mayā prokto 'pi na sthitaḥ
sādhūnāṃ darśanaṃ sparśaḥ kīrtanaṃ smaraṇaṃ tathā
sādhūnāṃ darśanaṃ puṇyaṃ tīrthabhūtā hi sādhavaḥ
sānandaṃ sadanaṃ sutāstu sudhiyaḥ kāntā mṛdurbhāṣiṇī
sāntve prayukte satataṃ kṛtavaire na viścaset
sā bālā vayamapragalbhamanasaḥ sā strī vayaṃ kātarāḥ
sā bhāryā yā gṛhe dakṣā śāntā caiva pativratā
sā bhāryā yā gṛhe dakṣā sā bhāryā yā prajāvatī
sā bhāryā yā patiprāṇā sā bhāryā yā prajāvatī
sābhāryā yā priyaṃ brūte sa putro yatra nirvṛtiḥ
sā bhāryā yā priyaṃ brūyātsa putro yastu jīvati
sā bhāryā yā śucirdakṣā sā bhāryā yā pativratā
sāma dānaṃ kṣamā dharmaḥ satyaṃ dhṛtiparākramau
sāmasiddhāni kāryāṇi vikṛtiṃ yānti na kvacit
sāmnā dānena bhedena krameṇa ca balena ca
sāmnā dānena bhedena samastairatha vā pṛthak
sāmnaiva yatra siddhirna tatra daṇḍo budhena viniyojyaḥ
sā samyā nagarī mahānsa nṛpatiḥ sāmantacakraṃ ca ta-
sārthaḥ pravasato mitraṃ bhāryā mitraṃ gṛhe sataḥ
sā śrīryā na madaṃ kuryātsa sukhī tṛṣṇeyojjhitaḥ
sā sabhā yatra sabhyo 'sti sa sabhyo dharmamāha yaḥ
sā sā saṃpadyate buddhiḥ sā matiḥ sā ca bhāvanā
sā sevā yā prabhuhitā grāhyavākyā viśeṣataḥ
sāhlādaṃ vacanaṃ prayacchasi na me no vāñchitaṃ kiṃ ca na
siddhiṃ vā yadi vāsiddhiṃ cittotsāho nivedayet
siddhiṃ prārthayatā janena viduṣā tejo nigṛhya svakaṃ
sīdanti santo vilasantyasantaḥ putrā mriyante janakaścirāyuḥ
sakṛte vaḥ kathaṃ śraddhā durite ca kathaṃ na sā
sukhaṃ vā yadi duḥkhaṃ bhūtānāṃ paryupasthitam
sukhaṃ vā yadi vāsukhaṃ priyaṃ vā yadi vāpriyam
sukhaṃ sevyaṃ tapo bhīmaṃ vidyā kaṣṭaṃ durācarī
sukhaṃ hi janturyadi vāpi duḥkhaṃ daivādhīnaṃ vindate nātmaś
sukhaṃ ca duḥkhaṃ ca bhavābhavau ca lābhālabhau maraṇaṃ jīvi
sukhaṃ nirāśaḥ svapiti nairāśyaṃ paramaṃ sukham
sukharthinaḥ kuto vidyā nāsti vidyārthinaḥ sukham
sukhe tu vartamāno vai duḥkhe vāpi narottama
sutanu jahihi kopaṃ paśya pādānataṃ māṃ
sudurbalaṃ nāvajānāti kañcidyukto ripuṃ sevate buddhipūrvam
sundaraṃ puruṣaṃ dṛṣṭvā bhrātaraṃ pitaraṃ sutam
surūpaṃ puruṣaṃ dṛṣṭvā pitaraṃ bhrātaraṃ sutam
surūpāḥ pañca yoddhāraḥ pāṇḍavāḥ patayo mama
sulabhāni hi śāstrāṇi upadeṣṭā tu durlabhaḥ
suveṣaṃ puruṣaṃ dṛṣṭvā bhrātaraṃ yadi vā sutam
suhṛdāṃ hitakāmānāṃ yaḥ śṛṇoti na bhāṣitam
suhṛdāṃ hitakāmānāṃ na karotīha yo vacaḥ
sūkṣmo 'pi bhāraṃ nṛpate syandano vai śakto voḍhuṃ na tathān
sūcyā sūtraṃ yathā vastre saṃsārayati vāyakaḥ
sūna saccaritaḥ satī priyatamā svāmī prasādenmukhaḥ
sendraṃ svargaṃ saśailāṃ kṣmāṃ sanāgendraṃ rasāralam
sevakairnijapatiḥ khalu sevyo nirdhano 'pi na paraḥ sadhano
seveva mānamakhilaṃ jyotsneva tamo jareva lāvaṇyam
somaḥ śaucaṃ dadau strīṇāṃ gandharvaśca śubhāṃ giram
sauhṛdasya na vāñchānti janakasya hitasya ca
stokaṃ dānaṃ supātrāya dattaṃ bhūriguṇaṃ bhavet
striyaṃ hi ya prārthayate saṃnikarṣaṃ ca gacchati
striyo ratnānyatho vidyā dharmaḥ śaucaṃ subhāṣitam
striyo hi capalā nityaṃ devānāmapi viśrutam
striyo hi nāma khalvetā nisargādeva paṇḍitāḥ
strī kāntaṃ vīkṣya nābhiṃ prakaṭayati muhurvikṣipantī kaṭākṣ
strī nadīvadidaṃ satyaṃ ramena galatā santā
strīratnabhogo 'asti narasya yasya niḥsvo 'api māṃ pratyavan
strī vinaśyati garveṇa tapaḥ krodhena naśyati
strīṣu goṣu na śastrāṇi pātayedbrāhmaṇeṣu ca
strīṣu na rāgaḥ kāryo raktaṃ puruṣaṃ striyaḥ paribhavanti
sthale jalaṃ jale rekhā bubhukṣitamukhe phalam
sthātavyaṃ pañcabhiḥ sārdhaṃ gantavya pañcabhiḥ saha
sthāna eva hi yujyante bhṛtyāścābharaṇāni ca
sthānaṃ nāsti kṣaṇo nāsti nāsti prārthayitā naraḥ
sthānabhraṣṭā na śobhante dantāḥ keśo nakhā narāḥ
sthāne nivāsaḥ sukulaṃ kalatraṃ putraḥ pavitraḥ svakanānurāg
sthitaṃ pūrvaṃ jalaṃ yatra punastatraiva gacchati
sthuitiḥ puṇye 'raṇaye saha paricayo hanta hariṇaiḥ
sthirā śailī guṇavatāṃ khalabuddhyā na bādhyate
snātvā gāṅgaiḥ payobhiḥ śucikusumaphalairarcayitvā vibho tvā
snigdhaṃ dhvanasi jīmūta vāridhārāṃ na muñcasi
sneho yatra bhayaṃ tatra sneho duḥkhasya kāraṇam
spṛhaṇīyāḥ kasya na te satataṃ saralāśayā mahātmānaḥ
sphuṭatu hṛdayaṃ kāmaḥ kāmaṃ karotu tanuṃ tanuṃ
smarārtāṃ vihvalāṃ dīnāṃ yo na kāmayate striyam
smartavyo 'haṃ tvayā kānte na smariṣyāmyahaṃ tava
svaguṇaṃ paradoṣaṃ ca vaktuṃ prārthayituṃ param
svagṛhe pūjyate mūrkhaḥ svagrāme pūjyate prabhuḥ
svacchāḥ saumyajalāśayāḥ pratidinaṃ te santu mā santu vā
svajātīyaṃ vinā vairī na jayyaḥ syātkadā ca na
svaṃ ca brahma ca saṃsāre muktau tu brahma kevalam
svadhiyo niścayo nāsti yasya sa bhramati svayam
svanāmā puruṣo dhanyaḥ pitṛnāmā tu madhryamaḥ
svaṃ nāsyarājake rāṣṭre puṃsāṃ na ca parigrahaḥ
svabhāvena hi tuṣyanti devāḥ sātpuruṣāḥ pitā
svabhāvo yādṛśo yasya na jahānti kadā ca na
svayaṃ kāryāṇi yaḥ kāle nānutiṣṭhati pārthivaḥ
svargacyutānāmiha jīvavaloke catvāri nityaṃ hṛdaye vasanti
svargastu na mumukṣūṇāṃ kṣayī cittaṃ vilobhayet
svargo dhanaṃ vā dhānyaṃ vā vidyāḥ putrāḥ sukhāni ca
svalpe 'pi guṇāḥ sphītā bhavanti guṇasamuditeṣu puruṣeṣu
svaśaktiṃ paraśaktiṃ ca deśaṃ kālaṃ ca tattvataḥ
svaśaktyā kurvataḥ karma na cesiddhiṃ prayacchati
svasya nindāṃ prakurvanti stavaṃ paraguṇasya ye
svahastena ca yaddattaṃ labhyate nātra saṃśayaḥ
svāmī dveṣṭi susevito 'pi sahasā projjhanti sadbāndhavā
svāmyādiṣṭastu yo bhṛtyaḥ samaṃ viṣamameva vā
svīyaṃ yaśaḥ pauruṣaṃ ca guptaye kathitaṃ ca yat
haṃsa prayaccha me kāntāṃ gatirasyāstvayā hṛtā
haṃsaḥ śveto bakaḥ śvetaḥ ko bhedo bakahaṃsayoḥ
hatvā vā harate śūraḥ śete vā nihataḥ śaraiḥ
haturyāti na gocaraṃ kimapi śaṃ puṣṇāti yatsarvadā-
harṣakrodhau yatau yasya kośaḥ svapratyayena ca
hasate kalpate vairī ekapātre bhunakti ca
hasta iva bhūtimalino yathā yathā laṅghayati khalaḥ sujanam
hastasya bhūṣaṇaṃ dānaṃ satyaṃ kaṇṭhasya bhūṣaṇam
hastī sthūlatanuḥ sa cāṅkuśavaśaḥ kiṃ hastimātro 'ṅkuśo
hālāhalamapi pītaṃ bahuśo bhikṣāpi bhikṣitā bhavatā
hā hā putraka nāghīta sugataitāsu rātriṣu
hiṃsakānyapi bhūtāni yo hinasti sa nirghṛṇaḥ
hitaṃ mitaṃ tathā snigdhaṃ madhuraṃ pariṇāmikam
hitārthaṃ vipriyaṃ hyukto mātuḥ kupyati vai sutaḥ
himāṃśumālī na tathā na cotphullotpalaṃ saraḥ
hīyate hi matistāta hīnaiḥ saha samāgamāt
hīyamānena vai sandhiḥ paryeṣṭavyaḥ samen ca
hṛdi viddha ivātyarthaṃ yayā santapyate janaḥ
he jihve kaṭukasnehe madhuraṃ kiṃ daridrasya
annadānātparaṃ dānaṃ na bhūtaṃ na bhaviṣyati
annamūlaṃ balaṃ puṃsāṃ balamūlaṃ hi jīvanam
apsu plavanti pāṣāṇā mānuṣā ghnanti rākṣasān
asatā saha saṅgena ko na yātyadhamāṃ gatim
āture niyamo nāsti bāle vṛddhe tathaiva ca
ādau tāto varaṃ paśyettato vittaṃ tataḥ kulam
āśayā kṛtadāso yaḥ sa dāsaḥ sarvadehinām
indriyaṃ vijitaṃ yena tenaiva bhuvanaṃ jitam
uttamaiḥ saha saṅgena ko na yāti samunnatim
uṣaḥ śaśaṃsa gārgyastu śakunaṃ tu bṛhaspatiḥ
ṛṇaṃ mitrānna kartavyaṃ na deyaṃ cāpi kitrake
kāle ca ripuṇā sandhiḥ kāle ca mitravigrahaḥ
kāvye śubhe 'pi racite khalu no khalebhyaḥ
kiṃ sa svargataruḥ ko 'pi yasya niśākaraḥ
kiṃ jāto 'pi catyṣpathe ghanataraṃ channo 'pi kiṃ chāyayā
kutaḥ kṛtaghnasya yaśaḥ sthānaṃ kutaḥ sukham
kuto vyasanino nidrā atṛptasya kuto ratiḥ
kṛśo 'pi siṃ ho na samo gajaindraiḥ sattvaṃ pradhānaṃ na tat
kṛṣato nāsti surbhikṣaṃ japato nāsti pātakam
ko jānīte kadā kasya mṛtyukālo bhaviṣyati
kva bhakṣyaṃ bhakṣake nityaṃ kva sukhāni ca rogiṇām
kṣatriyaṃ caiva sarpaṃ ca brāhmaṇaṃ ca bahuśrutam
gaṇādgrahītā vardheta gaṇasya tu na kiṃ ca na
gurūṇāṃ caiva sarveṣāṃ mātā paramako guruḥ
gomūtramātreṇa payo vinaṣṭaṃ takrasya gomūtraśatena kiṃ vā
jānāmi re sarpa tava prabhāvaṃ kaṇṭhasthito garjāsi śaṅkaras
tyāgena yuktā divamutpatanti tyāgena hīnā narakaṃ vrajanti
dānānna duṣkaraṃ tāta pṛthivyāmasti kiṃ ca na
dāsī bhṛtyaḥ suto bandhurvāstu vāhanameva ca
dāsī mānadhanaṃ hanti hanti veśyā dhanādhikam
durjanena saha prītiṃ kurute yaḥ sa tadruṇaḥ
dṛṣṭaḥ kathaṃ sutanu kiṃ kurute kimasma-
deśe deśe kalatrāṇi deśe ca bāndhavāḥ
dharmaṃ ca cintayetprājñaḥ svāhāraṃ naiva cintayet
nadīnāṃ jāhnavīṃ śreṣṭhāṃ nārīṇāṃ ca pativratām
nadī pātayate kūlaṃ nārī pātayate kulam
na vidyā kāraṇaṃ puṃsāṃ bhāgyameva hi kāraṇam
na sāhasī vipattau ca sāhasaṃ tyajati kṣaṇam
nāñjanaṃ śuklatāṃ yāti na vaikalyaṃ bahuśrutaḥ
nāsti grāmaḥ kutaḥ sīmā nāsti vidyā kuto yaśāḥ
nāsti satyaṃ sadā caure na śaucaṃ vṛṣalīpatau
paṅgo vandyastvamasi na gṛhaṃ yāsi yo 'rthī pareṣāṃ
pañca kṣipraṃ vinaśyanti stabdho lubdhaśca yo naraḥ
pañca me patayaḥ santi mahyaṃ ṣaṭho 'pi rocate
pitṛduḥkhaṃ tu ṣaṇmāsaṃ mātṛduḥkhaṃ tu vatsaraḥ
yatkiñcitkurute karma alpaṃ vā yadi vā mahat
yena tena prakāreṇa yasya kasyāpi dehinaḥ
yena yatnātkṛtaṃ kāryaṃ sa eva phalamśnute
sa va putro so 'pi śiṣyo ya ājñāṃ pālayedguroḥ
satītvaṃ bhūṣaṇaṃ strīṇāṃ drumāṇāṃ bhūṣaṇaṃ phalam
atanujvarapīḍitāsi bāle tava saukhyāya mato mamopavāsaḥ
adhare madhurā sarasvatī nanu karṇe maṇikarṇikāpravāhaḥ
anukūle vidhau deyaṃ yataḥ pūrayitā hariḥ
antarvāṇiṃ manyamānaḥ khalo 'yaṃ paurobhāgyaṃ sūktimuktāsu d
andhaṃ tamaścedayi bādhate tvāṃ sarojanetraṃ jagadekasūtram
anyāni śāstrāṇi vinodamātraṃ prāpteṣu kāleṣu na taiśca kiṃ c
apakāriṣu yaḥ sādhuḥ sa sādhuḥ sadbhirucyate
apado dūragāmī ca sākṣaro na ca paṇḍitaḥ
aparādhī nūnamahaṃ prasīda rambhoru virama saṃrambhāt
abalā yatra prabalā śiśuravanīśo nirakṣaro mantrī
ambā kupyati tāta mūrdhni vidhṛtā gaṅgeyamutsṛjyatāṃ
ayi kānta paśya meghaṃ nahi nahi pāpaṃ tavātipuṇyāyāḥ
ayi bata gurugarvaṃ mā sma kastūri yāsī-
ayi makarandasyandini padmini manye tavaiva subhagatvam
ayi malayaja mahimāyaṃ kasya girāmastu viṣayaste
ayi sakhi śastaḥ sakhivatpatiriti kiṃ tvaṃ na jānāsi
arthagrahaṇe na tathā dunoti kaṭukūjitairyathā piśunaḥ
arthini kavayati kavayati paṭhati ca paṭhati stavodyataṃ sta
alpākṣararamaṇīyaṃ yaḥ kathayati niścitaṃ sa khalu vāgmī
avinītaḥ suto jātaḥ kathaṃ na dahanātmakaḥ
aśanaṃ me vasanaṃ me jāyā me bandhuvargo me
asadvṛtto nāyaṃ na ca khalu guṇaireva rahitaḥ
asulabhā sakalendumukhī ca sā kimapi cedamanaṅgaviceṣṭitam
asthi nāsti śiro nāsti bāhurasti niraṅguliḥ
ahaṃ kimambā kimabhīṣṭatāpade taveti māturdhuri tātapṛcchayā
ahaṃ ca tvaṃ ca rājendra lokanāthāvubhāvapi
ahamiha sthitavatyapi tāvakī tvamapi tatra vasannapi māmakaḥ
aho nu kaṣṭaḥ satataṃ pravāsastato 'tikaṣṭaḥ paragehavāsaḥ
aho moho varākasya kākasya yadasau puraḥ
ākarṇya bhūpāla yaśastvadīyaṃ vidhūnayantīha na ke śirāṃsi
ākṣipasi karṇamakṣṇā balirapi baddhastvayā tridhā madhye
ājanma siddhaṃ kauṭilyaṃ khalasya ca halasya ca
ādau satyayuge balistadanu ca tretāyuge rāghavo
ābhīranāryāḥ karamādadhāno na śaṅkase mādhava kiṃ bravīṣi
āṣāḍhī kārttikī māghī vacā śuṇṭhī harītakī
āsyaṃ sahāsyaṃ nayanaṃ salāsyaṃ sindūrabindūdayaśobhi bhālam
icchedyastu sukhaṃ nivastumavanau gacchetsa rājñaḥ sabhāṃ
upaniṣadaḥ paripītā gītāpi ca hanta matipathaṃ nītā
upabhoktuṃ na jānāti śriyaṃ prāpyāpi mānavaḥ
ekaṃ vastu dvidhā kartuṃ bahavaḥ santi dhanvinaḥ
eṇīdṛśaḥ pāṇipuṭe niruddhā veṇī vireje śayanotthitāyāḥ
ete snigdhatamā iti mā mā kṣudreṣu yāta viśvāsam
eṣaiva yoṣitāṃ dhanyā śīlaṃ ca labhate sukham
ehi he ramaṇi paśya kautukaṃ dhūlidhūsaratanuṃ digambaram
kati pallavitā na puṣpitā vā taravaḥ santi samantato vasante
kamale kamalā śete haraḥ śete himālaye
karā himāṃśorapi tāpayantītyetatpriye cetasi naiva śaṅkyam
karoti śobhāmalake striyāḥ ko dṛśyā na kāntā vidhinā ca kokt
kastūrī jāyate kasmātko hanti kariṇāṃ śatam
kasmiñchete murāriḥ kva nu khalu vasatirvāyasī ko niṣedhaḥ
kasyeyaṃ taruṇi prapā pathika naḥ kiṃ pīyate 'syāṃ payo
kāka āhvayate kākānyācako na tu yācakān
kākaiḥ saha pravṛddhasya kokilasya kalā giraḥ
kācaṃ maṇiṃ kāñcanamekasūtre mugdhā nibadhnanti kimatra citr
kāmāndugdhe viprakarṣatyalakṣmīṃ kīrtiṃ sūte duṣkṛtaṃ yā hin
kārye satyapi jātu yāti na bahirnāpyanyamālokate
kā lokamātā kimu dehamukhyaṃ rateḥ kimādau kurute manuṣyaḥ
kāvyaṃ karoti sukaviḥ sahṛdaya eva vyanakti tattattvam
kā śaṃbhukāntā kimu candrakāntaṃ kāntāmukhaṃ kiṃ kurute bhuj
kiṃ khalu ratnairetaiḥ kiṃ khalu ratnāyitena vapuṣā te
kiṃ gotraṃ kimu jīvanaṃ kimu dhanaṃ kā janmabhūḥ kiṃ vayaḥ
kiṃ trāṇaṃ jagatāṃ na paśyati ca kaḥ ke devatā vidviṣaḥ
kiṃ tvaṃ na vetsi jagati prakhyātaṃ lābhakāraṇe mūlam
kimicchati naraḥ kāśyāṃ bhūpānāṃ ko raṇe hitaḥ
kimiti kṛśāsi kṛśodari kiṃ tava parakīyavṛttāntaiḥ
kiṃ puṣpaiḥ kiṃ phalaistasya karīrasya durātmanaḥ
kiṃ mālati mlāyasi yadyavidyaścucumba tumbīkusumaṃ ṣaḍaṅghri
kuṭilā lakṣmīryatra prabhavati na sarasvatī vasati tatra
kuta āgatya ghaṭate vighaṭya kva nu yāti ca
keśaiḥ kesaramālikāmapi ciraṃ yā bibhratī khidyate
ko nayati jagadaśeṣaṃ kṣayamatha bibharāṃ babhūva kaṃ viṣṇuḥ
kṣamā śastraṃ kare yasya durjanaḥ kiṃ kariṣyati
gaṇayanti nāpaśabdaṃ na vṛttabhaṅgaṃ kṣayaṃ na cārthasya
gate 'pi vayasi grāhyā vidyā sarvātmanā budhaiḥ
guṇayukto 'pyadho yāti riktaḥ kūpe yathā ghaṭaḥ
arthā na santi na ca muñcati māṃ durāśā
kusumaṃ kośātakyā vikasati rātrau divā ca kūṣmāṇḍyāḥ
